group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The treatment arm in the ARASENS trial includes Darolutamide, which is identified as an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor. This is stated in the abstract: 'Darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel' (page 1), and further clarified in the introduction: 'androgen receptor pathway inhibitor was evaluated in several phase III trials (PEACE-1, ENZAMET, and ARASENS)' (page 1), and in the discussion: 'adding an androgen receptor inhibitor (darolutamide) to ADT and docetaxel' (page 11).
